subcodes.first_line: The letters of that spiritual beloved have repeatedly arrived. Praise be to God, its words, in the garden of inner meanings, flow with the water of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه های آنحبیب روحانی مکرر رسید الحمد لله کلماتش در حدیقه معانی از آب محبت
